reddit_subreddits._comment: Wave 14DG (2026-05-31) — restored full 55-sub list (T1=10, T2=16, T3=29) per NATRIX direct ask: 'top 10 out of the 55 subreddits i told you to follow'. Wave 14CI had pruned to 10 — reverting. _collect_reddit_top10 now filters posts to only this allowlist so keyword-search hits from rando subs (indiegames/Layoffs/TechProfitLab) get dropped at compose time.

_meta.description: Watch queries for NCL autonomous scanner. Aligned with active NATRIX mandates.

wave_14CI_changes.youtube_queries_replaced: XRP / SLV / GLD / XRP ETF / OPTIONS FLOW / CAPITAL ROTATION (was AI/crypto/gamedev/AI music etc.)
wave_14CI_changes.reddit_subreddits_pruned: tier2 + tier3 removed — 55 → 10 subs to cut 95 signals/hr → ~20/hr

wave_14CX_changes.reddit_queries_replaced: XRP / silver squeeze / Fed rate cut / options flow unusual / GME short squeeze / capital rotation sectors (was 6 AI-business themes pulling course/bundle/affiliate spam — STREAM was 73% Reddit and 70% promo noise)
